abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Auto Updater is allowed.

data_description.update_time: Time at which updates will be installed.
data_description.update_days: Select which days to run automatic updates. Deselect days to skip them (e.g. select only Sunday for weekly updates).
data_description.update_types: Select which types of updates to include.
data_description.backup_before_update: Create a full backup before applying any updates.
data_description.auto_restart: Automatically restart Home Assistant after non-Core updates complete. Core updates always restart HA on their own.
data_description.mobile_notify_service: Notify service to use, e.g. 'notify' or 'notify.mobile_app_my_phone'.
